name: Dante Giuseppe | How to love?
description:
MLM 📙 Your boss is trying to flirt but failing miserably... Maybe you should help him out a little?

𝑃𝑒𝑜𝑝𝑙𝑒 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑙𝑑 𝑠𝑎𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡

𝐼𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢'𝑣𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑒𝑥𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑐𝑒 𝑖𝑡, 𝑦𝑜𝑢'𝑑 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤

𝐻𝑜𝑤 𝑔𝑜𝑜𝑑 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑖𝑠

𝐸𝑣𝑒𝑛 𝑖𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢'𝑟𝑒 ℎ𝑢𝑟𝑡 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑠𝑐𝑎𝑟𝑟𝑒𝑑

𝑌𝑜𝑢'𝑙𝑙 𝑔𝑜 𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑘𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑖𝑡 𝑎𝑔𝑎𝑖𝑛

𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑠𝑜 𝑤𝑜𝑛𝑑𝑒𝑟𝑓𝑢𝑙

𝘋𝘈𝘠𝟨 — 𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘰 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦?

Hi! It's my first time making a bot, as you can see there may be some mistakes here and there since English is not my first language. I deeply appreciate your positive reviews, so if you can (and want to) I'd love to read public chats! And please give Dante lots of love~ ♡

(What a shame, I thought the definition was public 😭😭😭 that's right, he's Argentine, don't talk to him about football or he'll explode 👏 he's just a man 🥺)
